prompt_text:
### Demographics: 39-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Normal
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 54.2 kg; Height 157.7 cm; BMI 21.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 114/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.4%; 9 months ago 8.7%; 6 months ago 9.2%; 3 months ago 9.6%; current 10.3%), FPG (12 months ago 202mg/dL; 9 months ago 183mg/dL; 6 months ago 200mg/dL; 3 months ago 227mg/dL; current 258mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 55.2kg; 9 months ago 53.8kg; 6 months ago 55.7kg; 3 months ago 55.7kg; current 54.2kg), Height (12 months ago 157.7cm; 9 months ago 157.7cm; 6 months ago 157.7cm; 3 months ago 157.7cm; current 157.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 21.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 114mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 75mmHg; 6 months ago 73mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 16U/L; 9 months ago 21U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 19U/L), AST (12 months ago 16U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 14U/L; current 12U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; current 52mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 155mg/g; 9 months ago 163mg/g; 6 months ago 260mg/g; 3 months ago 192mg/g; current 260mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 80mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 78mg/dL; current 79mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 59mg/dL; 9 months ago 62mg/dL; 6 months ago 62mg/dL; 3 months ago 62mg/dL; current 60mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 144mg/dL; 9 months ago 144mg/dL; 6 months ago 145mg/dL; 3 months ago 157mg/dL; current 151mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.8g/dL; 9 months ago 10.6g/dL; 6 months ago 10.6g/dL; 3 months ago 11.4g/dL; current 10.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.75 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
